Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Bastion's Veil]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — A Soulbound has breached Bastion's Veil.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 3''' — Bastion's Veil is a wall of fog that acts as if held back by a glass barrier.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Bastion’s Veil is a feature of the Gray Island that looks like a vast pillar of cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Bastion’s Veil is a location with an ancient wall of gray mist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — A secret bay is surrounded by rocks on three sides and Bastion's Veil on the fourth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Bastion’s Veil is a location that Bastion’s Shadow can slide through to reach a hidden bay.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Shera stared at Bastion’s Veil at the edge of the island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — Bastion’s Veil is a mist that can cleanse the Gray Island of Elderspawn when released.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — Bastion’s Veil has vanished.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — Bastion's Veil is an emergency protocol that sweeps all lesser Elderspawn off the Island.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — Bastion’s Veil is a wall of mist that usually surrounds the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 24''' — Bastion’s Veil is a cloud of mist that can shroud vessels.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Bastion's Veil is a supernatural blue-gray wall of fog that usually wraps the Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Bastion's Veil protects the island from the gazes of Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 3''' — Bastion's Veil is a wall of mist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — Bastion's Veil is a regenerating phenomenon on Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — Bastion's Veil is a product of the most powerful Awakened artifact in Consultant possession.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — Bastion's Veil is a source of silvery-blue mist that can shroud an island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — The purpose of Bastion's Veil was figured out by the enemy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — Bastion's Veil can collapse inward.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — Shera emerged from the cloud of Bastion's Veil.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Bastion’s Veil is a mist that protected the Consultant’s island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — The last Guard was pulled into Bastion's Veil.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Bastion’s Veil has thinned almost to nothing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Bastion’s Veil has the Intent to suppress Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 26''' — Bastion’s Veil is a power that may have suppressed Kelarac during the Last Battle of the Empire.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — Bastion's Veil is a location that Shera's gray clothes are meant for blending into.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — Bastion's Veil is a barrier of fog that can muffle voices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — Bastion’s Veil is a silver-blue light produced by Shera's shear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Bastion’s Veil can create clouds of silver-blue mist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Bastion’s Veil can be used to hide people from view.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 7''' — Bastion's Veil enforces absolute obedience to the Am'haranai leader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 7''' — Bastion's Veil is the greatest protection against Elders in the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 7''' — Bastion's Veil is a location associated with a Soulbound Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Bastion's Veil provides peace to Shera's soul.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Bastion’s Veil is a construct that Shera uses to see through mist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — Bastion’s Veil has a cool scent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — The Guild operated without a Soulbound tied to Bastion's Veil for centuries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Bastion’s Veil swallowed the Emperor’s Stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — Bastion's Veil is a location where the Masons' headquarters are located.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Bastion’s Veil is a construct that Shera can thicken.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 16''' — Bastion's Veil is a mist that Shera can dive into.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — The citizens saw the silvery mist of Bastion's Veil.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 21''' — Bastion’s Veil contains a stone pier.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Shera used Bastion’s power to see through the mist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Bastion’s Veil is a construct that Shera can channel energy into and which can explode over the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Shera borrowed the vision of Bastion’s Veil to see the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Shera used Bastion’s Veil to conceal her figure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Shera feeds power into Bastion's Veil.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Shera dismissed Bastion’s Veil using a fraction of her power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — Kelarac can provide protections greater than Bastion’s Veil.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
